title: Mob Battle Music: Majora's Mask Edition
description: Mob Battle Music resource pack that adds in Majora's Mask battle music.
body:
This is a resource pack that adds multiple custom tracks to the mod [Mob Battle Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-battle-music) from the hit game Majora's Mask.

All of the music in this pack has been recreated in FL Studio using the original soundfont.
There are slight differences but it's mostly unnoticable.

_Using this pack in videos _could_ get you claimed by Nintendo._
(you know how they are with their music)

Anyway, here are new tracks included the pack:

- Non-Aggro: Battle Theme (Modified)
- Aggro: Battle Theme (Normal)
- Harder Mobs: Mini Boss (Modified)
- "Boss" Mobs: Mini Boss (Normal)
- Wither Boss: Boss
- Ender Dragon: Majora Battle
- Player Battle(default): Chase

Video Showcase: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MStXLIfUyLg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
